    • AxiomMasterSection

      public AxiomMasterSection(org.eclipse.ui.forms.IManagedForm managedForm, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent, org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.FormToolkit toolkit, int style, IEventBEditor<?> editor)
      Constructor.

      Parameters:
      managedForm - The form to create this master section
      parent - The composite parent
      toolkit - The Form Toolkit used to create this master section
      style - The style used to create this master section
      editor - The Event-B Editor

  • Method Details

    • createTreeViewer

      protected EventBEditableTreeViewer createTreeViewer(org.eclipse.ui.forms.IManagedForm managedForm, org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.FormToolkit toolkit, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent)
      Create the tree view part. Return an Axiom Editable Tree Viewer.

      Specified by:
      createTreeViewer in class EventBTreePartWithButtons
      Parameters:
      managedForm - The mangaged form used to create the tree viewer.
      toolkit - The Form Toolkit used to create the tree viewer
      parent - The composite parent
      Returns:
      a new Event-B Editable Tree Viewer
      See Also:
      • EventBTreePartWithButtons.createTreeViewer(org.eclipse.ui.forms.IManagedForm, org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.FormToolkit, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite)
